# ADR-0011: Record an approach without a recognized decision heading

## Context

The knowledge context ingests decision documents authored by hand, and some
of those documents do not yet follow the decision-section heading convention.

## Rationale

We describe an approach here, but this section is not one of the recognized
decision-section headings, so no L1 extract can be drawn from this body.
